PRRT_kwDORSVgGc6OT56Q.reason: Removed `setHasMore(false)` from the load-more catch branch in AdminDashboard.tsx. A transient network error no longer permanently hides the 'Load more' button; the toast is sufficient user feedback, and hasMore remains unchanged so the user can retry without a full page reload.

PRRT_kwDORSVgGc6OWAXu.reason: Replaced the manual `replace(/"/g, ...).replace(/'/g, ...)` chain in the `link()` helper in emails.ts with `escapeHtml(url)`, which also escapes `&` to `&`. Without this, a URL query string like `?a=1&reg=2` could be decoded by email clients as `?a=1®=2`, corrupting the link.
